dataset_name: GSE207465 UNITI-2 Crohn whole-blood ustekinumab expression

publication_title: Biopsy and blood-based molecular biomarker of inflammation in IBD
population: Adult; moderate-to-severe Crohn disease; UNITI-2 clinical trial context
study_design: Clinical trial expression profiling at week 0, week 6, and week 8 after ustekinumab or placebo induction
potential_use_cases: Ustekinumab response; peripheral blood treatment-response biomarkers; UNITI cross-tissue comparison
limitations: Same UNITI family as DS047 and DS107; blood versus tissue overlap not reconciled; subject-level crosswalk not checked
data_access_status: Public raw CEL files; public processed GEO data
curation_status: Clinical trial gap candidate; source checked
notes: Safe first clinical-trial gap addition from OQ122; preserve countability uncertainty pending UNITI subject-ID reconciliation.
verified_by: Codex OQ122 clinical trial gap review
verification_notes: Verified from top clinical trial candidate review. Whole-blood microarray from moderate-to-severe Crohn disease UNITI-2/Stelara phase 3 context; 1733 GEO samples; same UNITI family as existing tissue rows DS047 and DS107 but no public subject crosswalk applied.
overlap_notes: Same UNITI family as DS047/GSE112366 and DS107/GSE207022. Blood versus tissue and no subject crosswalk checked; do not count independently from UNITI tissue rows until patient IDs are reconciled.
